differentials.name: Retention cyst
differentials.raw: Retention cyst (= exudate within bursa omentalis from acute pancreatitis)

differentials.name: Lymphoepithelial cyst: cysts are lined by squamous epithelium and surrounded by dense lymphoid tissue
differentials.raw: Lymphoepithelial cyst: cysts are lined by squamous epithelium and surrounded by dense lymphoid tissue

differentials.name: CONGENITAL (rare) (a)  solitary true pancreatic cyst (b)  systemic disease / syndromes with multiple true cysts
differentials.raw: CONGENITAL (rare) (a)  solitary true pancreatic cyst (b)  systemic disease / syndromes with multiple true cysts

context: With clearer depiction of septa, cyst contents and pancreatic ductal system, MRI can often achieve a more specific diagnosis. Incidence:  2.6% of consecutive CT scans, 13.5% at MRI (b)  acquired cyst:
